name: Tough Love
additional_info: Charms for 2 seconds with a 1 second cooldown. Tough Love's damage buff affects all sources of Charm, not just Tough Love's. Tough Love's damage buff is affected by the damage modifier cap.
desc: Deal 10% more damage to enemies Charmed by you. Mantras deal +5% instead. Being hit by someone the same Aspect or Oath as you applies Charmed briefly.
